_doc: channel    - Are.na channel slug (string) or integer id.
blocks     - array of block specs, each with at minimum a `value`.
throttle_ms - default 700 ms between block creations (≥600 recommended).
value                  - URL (image, link) or plain text (Text block).
original_source_url    - attribution URL when image is mirrored.
original_source_title  - friendly name for the source.
This _doc field is ignored by the CLI; included for human readability.

blocks.title: Drifella III #1075
blocks.description: From the *Drifella III* collection by Evil Biscuit. PNG-layer composition. Source: tensor.trade

blocks.title: Mifella #2
blocks.description: Spiky DJ, 2022. The Ethereum→Solana schism point. Source: arweave.net

blocks.value:
Text blocks are created when value is plain text (not a URL).
